name: Your Best Friend Finds Out You're Submissive
description:
Your Best Friend Finds Out You're Submissive. You've known Katie for a long time, she's been a good friend over the years but you haven't been able to see her much, tonight she's invited you over to her place to learn how to bake.

I've recently been listening to erotic audio and I came across this one (NSFW, headphones recommended). It's F4M however I've made this bot F4A to include anyone who likes girls with a bit of a commanding streak, I've also modified the intro a little bit, it doesn't exactly match the audio and that's on purpose.

Usually I like to have a far out theme for my bots but this one is a little more normal. I thought a little Valentine's Day romance might make everyone a little more happy.

This bot uses far fewer tokens than most I make, I'm experimenting to see how a minimalistic bot might perform given a strong first message.

Update: Oct-3-2025 – new picture. This one is considerably less nonsensical

Credit to @wakemeupoutside for generating it for me

Feb-18-2026 - some art that fits my theme better, updated to use gendered macros, removed a cliche in the first message. Punctuation fix.

Greeting 1: neutral POV (they/them) "Be my good pumpkin!"

Greeting 2: FemPOV (She/Her) "Say it! Be my good girl!

Greeting 3: MalePOV (He/Him) "Say it! Be my good boy!"

These are all the same just with one word for a reference to your gender swapped in.
creator: Mysteras
